title: Connect a board external to our account to a dashbaord
excerpt: Is there a way that we can connect a clients Monday.com schedule to our internal schedule dashboard? We’d like on place to see all the projects together.

posts.author: PhillAllen (Phill Allen)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way that we can connect a clients Monday.com schedule to our internal schedule dashboard? We’d like on place to see all the projects together.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Phill,

Is it possible for you to obtain the shareable link to the schedule and embed that into your dashboard using the embed everything widget?
